rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms this is the final total line with no description. The raw amounts are 199 pounds, 2 shillings, and 49 pence. As 49 pence violates the pence rule (max 11), gemini-flash's conversion of 49 pence to 4 shillings and 1 pence, adding the 4 shillings to the existing 2 shillings (total 6 shillings), is adopted as the correct interpretation.
